requirement.original: 修全部 — fix all 3 remaining issues identified by codex assessment
requirement.clarified: Fix three codex assessment residuals: (A) close cross-session staging escape hatches in changelog-analyst.md, (B) add ANSI-C hex/octal/unicode escape normalization to pretool-bash-safety.sh Layer 1.F, (C) replace stale stderr token in 16 test files
requirement.what: Three fixes: changelog-analyst isolation, ANSI-C escape bypass, stale test token
requirement.why: Cross-session contamination risk, security bypass in hook, broken test assertions

included: agents/changelog-analyst.md Phase 7 orphan handling BULK=false guard
16 test files under tests/generated/ token replacement

success_criteria: BULK=false with no dev-report aborts instead of staging all files
Orphan files in BULK=false are warned+skipped, not committed
constraints: Do not modify docs/dev/ historical artifacts
normalize_ansic_token() must fail-closed on decode errors

root_cause_analysis.symptom: Three codex-identified issues: cross-session staging contamination risk, ANSI-C escape bypass in hook, stale test token mismatch
root_cause_analysis.root_cause: (A) changelog-analyst.md contains two escape hatches that bypass the M5/M6 whitelist: stage-all fallback when no dev-report exists (line 124-127) and orphan-commit path (lines 329-340). (B) Python shlex.shlex(posix=True) does not expand ANSI-C $'...' hex/octal/unicode escapes; tokens like $'\x2dfprint' tokenize to '$\x2dfprint' which does not match '-fprint' even after $-stripping. (C) Hook stderr token was renamed from bulk-commit-auth-flag-write to bulk-commit-sentinel-write but 16 test files still assert the old token.
root_cause_analysis.why_introduced: (A) Stage-all was original behavior before M5/M6 whitelist was added; orphan-commit was designed for bulk mode but applies to non-bulk too. (B) shlex limitation is inherent to Python's shlex module. (C) Token rename in hooks/pretool-bash-safety.sh did not update downstream test assertions.
root_cause_analysis.why_problematic: (A) Old-code sessions or missing dev-reports bypass all isolation. (B) Attacker can encode write-action flags in ANSI-C escapes to bypass bulk-commit-sentinel protection. (C) Tests fail on token assertion.
observations: shlex.shlex('find /tmp/foo $\'\\x2dfprint\' /tmp/out', posix=True) tokenizes to ['find', '/tmp/foo', '$\\x2dfprint', '/tmp/out'] — bypass confirmed (observed: Python runtime test)
$-strip normalizes '$\\x2dfprint' to '\\x2dfprint' which does NOT match '-fprint' (observed: Python runtime test)
changelog-analyst.md:329-340 specifies orphan commit in all modes (observed: Read)
root_cause_analysis.localization_evidence: Python runtime test confirmed shlex bypass; grep confirmed stale tokens; Read confirmed escape-hatch code paths
root_cause_analysis.located_source: hooks/pretool-bash-safety.sh:884-903 (ANSI-C defense gap), agents/changelog-analyst.md:124-127,329-340 (escape hatches), 16 test files (stale token)

git_bisect_result.bisect_blocked: Not a regression — design gaps identified by codex assessment

requirements_decomposition.source_phrase: changelog-analyst.md MUST refuse to stage files whose git diff timestamp falls outside the current session's lifetime
requirements_decomposition.acceptance_criterion: BULK=false no-dev-report path aborts instead of staging all

requirements_decomposition.source_phrase: hooks/pretool-bash-safety.sh Layer 1.F shlex tokenizer does NOT expand bash ANSI-C hex/octal escapes
~14 test files assert old token bulk-commit-auth-flag-write. Hooks now emit bulk-commit-sentinel-write
requirements_decomposition.acceptance_criterion: old token replaced in all 16 affected test files under tests/generated/

component_chain.role: Stage-all fallback when no dev-report exists (BULK=false)
component_chain.evidence: Read line 124: 'WARNING: no dev-report found for task <TASK_ID> — falling back to stage-all behavior'
Read lines 329-340: 'Files present in git status tracked-modified but absent from dev-report...commit them separately'

component_chain.role: Write-action veto for find with $-strip ANSI-C defense

pre_existing_guards.purpose: Strip $ bytes from ANSI-C concatenated forms before WRITE_ACTION_FLAGS matching

setup.reason: non-UI -- hook / agent-prompt edit; cycle does not produce (1) rendered UI changes, (2) browser interaction, (3) Playwright invocation, (4) screenshot evidence, or (5) any change to user-triggered code paths

evidence.observed: Codex assessment identified 3 residual issues: cross-session isolation gaps, ANSI-C escape bypass, stale test token

measured.value: shlex tokenizes $'\x2dfprint' to '$\x2dfprint' (no hex expansion); $-strip yields '\x2dfprint' (still no match)

expected.value: All ANSI-C escape forms should be decoded to their actual characters before deny matching

evidence.gap: shlex does not interpret \xNN/\0NNN/\NNN/\uNNNN/\UHHHHHHHH escapes within $'...' tokens

additional_found: 16 files total: 13 .py + 3 manifest.json across 4 test directories

reference_source.description: Python runtime test verified shlex behavior; Read verified hook stderr tokens and changelog-analyst escape hatches

context.codebase_state: master branch, multiple untracked/modified files from concurrent sessions
context.recent_commits: aea75d9 chore(docs): ship cycle 20260522-000000; 80a941a chore(hooks): remove dead auth-flag code

development_approach.strategy: Three parallel fixes: (1) tighten changelog-analyst.md escape hatches, (2) add ANSI-C escape normalization to Layer 1.F Python helper, (3) sed-replace stale token in test files
development_approach.validation_approach: Run affected pytest tests to verify token assertions pass; manually test ANSI-C bypass vectors against the hook; verify changelog-analyst.md text changes

codex_consult.feedback_summary: 4 findings. Items B/C confirmed real and scoped. Item A's mtime/GIT_INDEX_FILE proposal rejected as unreliable — proposed enforcing at pretool-git-privilege-guard.py instead. BA applied the escape-hatch-closure approach (ABORT on no-dev-report, warn+skip orphans in BULK=false) which is in the user-need path without expanding to privilege-guard modifications.

findings.issue: Item A's mtime/GIT_INDEX_FILE proposal is not reliable isolation
findings.proposed_fix: Enforce at commit-authorization time via pretool-git-privilege-guard.py staged-file whitelist
findings.rationale: Agreed mtime/GIT_INDEX_FILE is unreliable. Applied the escape-hatch-closure approach (ABORT on no-dev-report, warn+skip orphans) in changelog-analyst.md instead of expanding to privilege-guard — stays in user-need path

findings.issue: Item A misses existing stage-all/orphan escape hatches
findings.proposed_fix: No-dev-report should abort/scope-violate, not stage-all. Orphans should warn/skip, not commit.
findings.rationale: Directly applied — M1 makes no-dev-report abort, M2 makes orphans warn+skip in BULK=false

findings.issue: Item B octal coverage must include \NNN forms, not only \0NNN
findings.proposed_fix: Add narrow normalize_ansic_token() that decodes \xHH, \uHHHH, and octal \NNN/\0NNN
findings.rationale: Incorporated into M3 — both \0NNN and \NNN octal forms are specified

findings.issue: Item C's replacement should be restricted to tests/generated only
findings.rationale: Already scoped to tests/generated/ in the draft — made explicit in M4 and Won't Have

codex_consult.feedback_incorporated: All 4 findings addressed: mtime/GIT_INDEX_FILE approach replaced with escape-hatch closure; stage-all fallback converted to ABORT; orphan handling guarded by BULK flag; octal \NNN added to normalization spec; test replacement explicitly scoped to tests/generated/

_risk_level_doc: Medium: security-relevant hook change (ANSI-C bypass) + multi-file agent doc change + 16 test file updates. Does not affect pipeline orchestrators or >5 unique source files.
